paper_title: Pliocene Model Intercomparison (PlioMIP) Phase 2: scientific objectives and experimental design

methods.description: This method outlines the experimental design for PlioMIP Phase 2, including the grouping of experiments, nomenclature, and boundary conditions for climate modeling.

steps.description: The experiments in PlioMIP Phase 2 have been grouped into halves 'Pliocene4Pliocene' and 'Pliocene4Future' and should ideally be completed by all participating groups.
Each half of the project is divided into two 'tiers'. After the core experiments, Tier 1 experiments are identified as a higher priority for completion than Tier 2.
steps.searchable_summary: Divide experiments into core, Tier 1, and Tier 2

steps.description: Model simulations consist of various combinations of boundary conditions associated with prescribed CO2, orography, soils, lakes, and ice sheets.
steps.searchable_summary: Simulate models with combinations of boundary conditions

steps.description: Use nomenclature Ex c, where c is the concentration of CO2 in ppmv, and x are any boundary conditions which are Pliocene as opposed to pre-industrial.
steps.searchable_summary: Apply nomenclature for CO2 concentration and boundary conditions

methods.method_name: Data Processing and Storage for PlioMIP Phase 2
methods.description: This method describes the data processing and storage requirements for PlioMIP Phase 2, including file formats and metadata conventions.

steps.description: Model data for this experiment must use the Climate Model Output Rewriter (CMOR) format and stored on an ESGF node.
steps.searchable_summary: Format model data using CMOR and store on ESGF node

steps.description: Data files have to be in the netCDF binary file format and conform to the CF metadata convention.
steps.searchable_summary: Convert data files to netCDF format with CF metadata
